name: Powermatic Data Systems Limited
summary: Powermatic Data Systems Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures, sells, markets, and distributes wireless connectivity products and related services in Singapore and other Asian countries, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company operates through, Wireless Connectivity Products and Property segments. It provides wireless radio modules, embedded boards, indoor and outdoor access points, and wireless antennas used in industrial PC, IOT, healthcare, hospitality, security surveillance and other industries, as well as offers OEM and ODM solutions, and other sales related services. The company is also involved in the lease and maintenance of Harrison Industrial Building, a freehold investment property in Singapore; and trading of computers related peripherals. It serves electronic and wireless device component distributors, system integrators, wireless products design houses, and other corporations. Powermatic Data Systems Limited was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Singapore.
